eyebrow.zh: 运动 · 旅途 · 镜头

title.zh: 用一点节奏，给自己换口气
title.en: Catch a breath through movement and miles

paragraph.zh: 实验室和项目之外，我喜欢用运动和镜头给生活换口气。骑上车去感受公路与城市，球场上和队友切换乒乓、羽毛、篮球的节奏；周末有空就往山野走走，再用相机把那些瞬间留下来。我相信工程师不仅是解决问题的人，也应该是能感受生活、保有好奇的人。
paragraph.en: Outside the lab and the IDE, I keep myself fresh through sports and photography. Cycling through streets and country roads, rotating between table tennis, badminton, and basketball on the court; weekends I head out to the mountains when I can, and there's always a camera in my hand to keep those moments. To me an engineer isn't only someone who solves problems — they should also feel the world and stay curious about it.

value.zh: 骑行 · 跑步 · 球类 · 旅游 · 摄影

description.zh: 周末或假期跑去山野与城市之间，看不同的风景、想不同的事，回来又能专注一阵子。
description.en: Heading out to mountains and cities on weekends — different scenery, different thoughts, and I come back ready to focus.

description.zh: 周末骑上车，从城市穿到郊外的公路，节奏稳了，心也安静下来。
description.en: After-work or weekend rides — pushing from the city into countryside roads. A steady cadence settles the mind.

description.zh: 篮球、乒乓球、羽毛球轮着打。喜欢团队配合的对抗，也享受拍子之间的细微判断。热爱跑步，热爱马拉松，享受在路上和时间赛跑的感觉。
description.en: Basketball, table tennis, and badminton on rotation. I love team play and the small split-second reads of racket sports. I love running and love marathons. I enjoy the feeling of running and racing against time on the road.

description.zh: 以工程师的眼光观察结构、光影与街头瞬间，用镜头给日常留一点痕迹。
description.en: Watching structure, light, and street moments with an engineer's eye — letting the camera keep a trace of daily life.
